---
title: "Madeline Eppley"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/MadelineGEppley
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/madeline-eppley
---

Madeline Eppley is a PhD Student at Northeastern University in Marine and Environmental Science.

## Education

Northeastern University Marine Science Center | Boston, MA
PhD in Marine and Environmental Science | Sept 2021 - Current

Bard College at Simon's Rock | Great Barrington, MA
B.A in Biology, magna cum laude | Sept 2016 - May 2020
------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check out the [Lotterhos Lab Website](https://sites.google.com/site/katielotterhos/home) for more information about my lab and our research!

------------------------------------------------------------------------

_I made this website with Quarto. 
Learn more about Quarto websites here: <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>._
